name: ks-medicaid-policy
note: KMAP (Kansas Medical Assistance Program) Provider Manuals — 50 per-service FFS PDFs behind a Kendo dropdown (ContentID GUID → versioned /Documents/Provider/Provider%20Manuals/<slug>_<rev>_<rev>.pdf). Whole portal sits behind Oracle Access Manager: curl 302→obrar.cgi even on direct PDF links — browser-only. KanCare MCOs publish their own manuals separately; these are the state FFS policy. No standalone Laboratory manual (lab is inside Professional).

docs.title: DME / Medical Supply Dealer Provider Manual

_comment: Index is a Kendo DropDownList (50 current + discontinued list) with no static hrefs — selecting an item resolves ContentID server-side to a revision-suffixed PDF filename. Dropdown dataSource fields: {Description, ContentID, DataListItemCode, StrEffectiveDate}; Url field is null in payload. fetch-reference handler will need to drive the dropdown (or replay the change-handler XHR with a session cookie) to resolve current PDF filenames; the _NNNNN_NNNNN suffixes change on each republish. 3 URLs above captured from Google index (point-in-time revisions). All /Documents/* and /PublicPage/* paths 302 to obrar.cgi without an OAM cookie.
